name: M2i Global, Inc.
summary: PART I Unless otherwise stated or the context requires otherwise, references in this annual report on Form 10-K to we, us, our, the Company, M2i, and our Company refer to M2i Global, Inc., a Nevada corporation, and its subsidiaries. OUR BUSINESS Our Vision Our vision is to secure reliable access to critical minerals and metals for the U.S., its allies, and partners. We expect to accomplish this by developing a world-class portfolio of critical minerals and materials projects. The diversity of ou...
